allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('summary',''\)\); print\('Severity:', d.get\('severity',''\)\); vs=[v for v in d.get\('vulnerabilities',[]\)]; [print\('Fixed in:', v.get\('patched_versions',''\)\) for v in vs]")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-WinEvent -LogName Application -MaxEvents 200 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.TimeCreated -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-4\) -and \($_.ProviderName -eq '\\''.NET Runtime'\\'' -or $_.ProviderName -eq '\\''Application Error'\\'' -or $_.Message -match '\\''OrderDeck'\\''\) } | Select-Object TimeCreated, ProviderName, Id, LevelDisplayName, @{N='\\''Msg'\\'';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(800,$_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-WinEvent -LogName Application -MaxEvents 500 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.TimeCreated -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-4\) -and \($_.ProviderName -eq '\\''Application Error'\\'' -or $_.ProviderName -eq '\\''.NET Runtime'\\''\) -and $_.Message -match '\\''OrderDeck'\\'' } | Select-Object -First 5 TimeCreated, ProviderName, Id, LevelDisplayName, @{N='\\''Msg'\\'';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(2000,$_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-WinEvent -LogName Application -MaxEvents 2000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.TimeCreated -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-4\) -and $_.Message -match '\\''OrderDeck.App'\\'' } | Select-Object -First 10 TimeCreated, ProviderName, Id, @{N='\\''Msg'\\'';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(3000,$_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='\\''Application'\\''; ProviderName='\\''Application Error'\\''} -MaxEvents 30 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.TimeCreated -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-6\) } | Select-Object TimeCreated, Id, @{N='\\''Msg'\\'';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(1500,$_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='\\''Application'\\''; ProviderName='\\''.NET Runtime'\\''; Level=2} -MaxEvents 30 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.TimeCreated -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-6\) } | Select-Object TimeCreated, Id, @{N='\\''Msg'\\'';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(2000,$_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match '\\''OrderDeck|LiveDeck'\\'' } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime, MainWindowTitle, @{N='\\''WS_MB'\\'';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match '\\''OrderDeck'\\'' } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle, @{N='\\''HasWindow'\\'';E={$_.MainWindowHandle -ne [IntPtr]::Zero}} | Format-Table')
